title: Magnetic Light
description: The SL WY 6101 Magnetic Light is a compact 10W lighting fixture designed for modern track systems. Equipped with high-quality Osram LEDs, it delivers consistent brightness with superior efficiency. Its sleek magnetic design allows easy installation and repositioning without tools, making it ideal for dynamic lighting setups in retail, offices, and homes. With dual CCT options (3000K/4000K), it ensures flexibility for both ambient and focused lighting requirements.

details.Product Design: Minimalist yet durable, crafted for modern interiors where flexibility and aesthetics matter.
details.Lighting Quality: Powered by Osram LEDs for bright, stable output with high energy efficiency.
details.Magnetic Mounting: Easy to attach, detach, and reposition without extra tools, enhancing adaptability.
details.Applications: Suitable for living rooms, showrooms, retail shops, galleries, and modern offices.

title: Round Shape Magnetic Track Light
description: The Round Shape Magnetic Track Light is a modern and versatile indoor lighting solution designed for style, flexibility, and efficiency. With its magnetic mounting system, the light can be easily attached, moved, or adjusted along the track—offering complete freedom in your lighting layout. Perfect for showrooms, offices, retail stores, galleries, and modern homes.

details.Product Details: The Round Shape Magnetic Track Light brings a seamless blend of aesthetics and performance. Its trimless recessed design ensures a sleek look, while the magnetic system allows effortless repositioning without tools.
details.Premium Construction: Built from high-quality aluminum with a powder-coated finish, ensuring excellent heat dissipation and durability. Equipped with premium LED chips, the light guarantees high brightness, energy efficiency, and a long lifespan.
details.Easy Installation: With its magnetic track design, installation is quick and tool-free. Simply place the fixture on the magnetic rail, and it locks securely in place—allowing easy adjustments whenever needed.
details.Versatile Application: Ideal for retail stores, art galleries, offices, showrooms, and modern homes. Its adjustable lighting angle makes it perfect for highlighting artworks, displays, or architectural features with precision.

title: Curve Shape Magnetic Track Light
description: The New Generation Curved Shape Magnetic Light is a futuristic indoor lighting solution that combines artistic curves with advanced magnetic technology. Its elegant flowing design and smooth illumination bring a modern, luxurious touch to interiors. Designed for flexibility, it allows dynamic layouts and creative lighting patterns in homes, offices, galleries, and showrooms.

details.Product Details: The Curved Shape Magnetic Light introduces a new dimension in lighting design with its arc-shaped profile. Its trimless, minimal aesthetic blends seamlessly into interiors, while the magnetic system allows effortless repositioning and flexible layouts without tools.
details.Premium Construction: Crafted from high-quality aluminum with a durable powder-coated finish for excellent heat dissipation and strength. Integrated with advanced LED technology, it ensures bright, energy-efficient, and long-lasting illumination, while the curved form adds a futuristic design element.
details.Easy Installation: The magnetic track mechanism makes installation simple and tool-free. Just place the fixture onto the magnetic rail, and it locks firmly in place. Adjustments and repositioning can be done anytime with ease, giving complete freedom in lighting design.
details.Versatile Application: Perfect for luxury homes, retail outlets, hotels, art galleries, offices, and creative studios. The curved design allows architects and designers to create flowing arcs, unique light patterns, and immersive ambiences that enhance both functionality and style.

details.Easy Installation: No installation or configuration needed. Simply pair the remote with compatible devices and start controlling instantly.
details.Versatile Application: Ideal for controlling lighting systems, fans, home appliances, and other electronic devices in homes, offices, hotels, and commercial spaces.

Its sleek, premium finish adds a touch of sophistication to any space.

details.Premium Construction: Crafted from high-quality materials, the switch is durable, long-lasting, and built to withstand everyday use. The smooth, stylish surface complements contemporary interiors.

title: For Online Control
description: The For Online Control Wireless Gateway is a cutting-edge solution for smart device management, allowing seamless online connectivity and control. It provides a reliable bridge between devices and the network, enabling remote operation and monitoring through apps or cloud services.

details.Product Details: This wireless gateway enables efficient online control of connected devices. It supports multiple protocols and ensures stable, secure connectivity for homes, offices, and commercial setups.
details.Premium Construction: Designed with high-quality components for long-lasting performance and durability. Compact and sleek design fits effortlessly into modern interiors.
details.Easy Installation: Quick and straightforward setup with guided instructions. Simply connect to your network and pair devices for instant online control.
details.Versatile Application: Ideal for smart homes, offices, hotels, and other spaces where centralized online device management is needed. Supports lighting, appliances, and other compatible smart devices.
